Container.Name: InstaSync
Container.Overview: Self-hosted Instagram profile-picture API for Apple Shortcuts. Cache data and optional Instaloader session cookies persist under /data.

Config.Name: Persistent Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent cache and Instaloader session-cookie storage. Keep this mapped to /mnt/user/appdata/instasync on Unraid.

Config.Name: Instagram Username
Config.Description: Optional account used with a persisted Instaloader session file. Set together with Instaloader Session File.

Config.Name: Instaloader Session File
Config.Description: Optional session-cookie path inside the container, such as /data/session-your-instagram-username. Set together with Instagram Username.
